subcodes.first_line: O skilled poet! The Ridvan ode was observed; it was the song of the nightingale of the love of God, and a melody [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شاعر ماهر قصیده رضوانیه ملاحظه گردید گلبانگ بلبل محبه الله بود و نغمه
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
